content.title: 🎉 Welcome to the Contoso Hackathon 2026!
content.subtitle: Sponsored by Contoso | Powered by Microsoft Azure

sections.heading: 👋 About This Hackathon
sections.body: Welcome, future cloud engineers! The Contoso Hackathon 2024 is a weekend-long team challenge where you and your teammates will use Microsoft Azure to deploy real cloud infrastructure using the Azure CLI. This is your chance to learn, collaborate, and compete — all in a live Azure environment built exclusively for you.

sections.heading: 🏆 Prizes Up for Grabs
sections.body:
🥇 1ST PLACE — Grand Champion
   • $1,000 Cash Prize
   • Contoso Excellence Trophy
   • Azure Certification Vouchers (1 Year) for all team members
   • Fast-track interview with [Sponsor Name]

🥈 2ND PLACE — Runner Up
   • $600 Cash Prize
   • Contoso Merit Trophy
   • Azure Certification Vouchers (6 Months) for all team members
   • Feature on [Sponsor Name] official social media

🥉 3RD PLACE — Rising Star
   • $300 Cash Prize
   • Contoso Rising Star Trophy
   • Azure Certification Vouchers (3 Months) for all team members

🌟 Every team that completes the challenge receives a Certificate of Achievement!

sections.heading: 👥 Team Structure
sections.body:
• Teams consist of 3 to 4 members
• Each team shares ONE dedicated Azure subscription
• All teammates can see and manage each other's deployed resources
• The first member to register becomes the Group Leader

content.title: ⚙️ What's Inside Your Lab Environment
content.subtitle: Everything you need — pre-deployed and ready to go

sections.heading: ✅ What Gets Auto-Deployed When Your Lab Launches
sections.body:
The following resources are automatically provisioned the moment your team clicks Launch Lab — no manual setup required:

🖥️  Windows 11 Virtual Machine
   • Accessible directly from your browser — no RDP client needed
   • Azure CLI is pre-installed and ready to use
   • This is your team's primary workspace for the hackathon

🔑  Service Principal (Auto-Created)
   • Automatically generated inside your Azure subscription
   • Credentials appear on your lab details page:
       - Application (Client) ID
       - Client Secret
       - Tenant ID
       - Subscription ID
   • Use these credentials in your Azure CLI scripts to authenticate

sections.heading: 🚀 Your Hackathon Challenge
sections.body:
Your team's mission is to use the Azure CLI — authenticated through your Service Principal — to deploy Azure infrastructure as defined in the lab guide.

Example of what you will be doing:

   Step 1: Open PowerShell on your Windows 11 VM
   Step 2: Log in using your Service Principal credentials
           az login --service-principal \
                    --username <AppID> \
                    --password <ClientSecret> \
                    --tenant <TenantID>
   Step 3: Deploy Azure resources using az commands
   Step 4: Verify and manage your deployments as a team

sections.heading: ⚠️ Important Rules to Remember
sections.body:
⏱️  VM Uptime Limit
   Your VM is active for HALF the total lab duration only.
   Once the VM uptime limit is reached, it shuts down automatically.
   Plan your CLI-heavy work within the active VM window.

🔒  One Attempt Per Team
   Once you click Launch Lab, your environment is LIVE.
   There are NO resets and NO redeployments.
   Make sure your entire team is ready before launching.

👁️  Shared Environment
   All teammates share the same subscription.
   Resources deployed by one member are visible to everyone.
   Communicate with your team before making changes!

📋  Judging Criteria
   • Completeness of infrastructure deployed
   • Correct use of Service Principal authentication
   • Quality and structure of CLI scripts
   • Teamwork and collaboration

sections.heading: 📞 Need Help?
sections.body:
• Raise your hand for a proctor/mentor during the event
• Check the Lab Guide for step-by-step instructions once your lab is live
• Contact the Spectra Systems support team via the Help button on your lab page
